title: ImportBatch
description: A single ingest operation: source, target_type, mapping, row counts, and lifecycle state. One ImportBatch per user-initiated import run. Per-row failures live in import_batch_rows with batch_id FK.

id.description: Batch identifier — prefixed `imp_` followed by 12-char crockford32.

organization_id.description: Per-tenant scope. Every read/write filtered on this column.

actor_type.description: Who initiated the batch. Agent-initiated imports come through callSkill(ctx, 'csv-import', …).

source_type.description: Where the records came from. csv + paste land in v1; remaining adapters land as separate handlers satisfying the same shape.

source_file_url.description: R2 path for csv source; null for paste / API sources.

source_reference.description: External system reference — e.g. HubSpot list id, Pipedrive filter id. Null for csv/paste.

target_type.description: Record type rows are written into.

field_mapping.description: source_column → target_field. Validated against target_type's required fields at preview time.

dedupe_strategy.description: How a duplicate is identified. Per-target defaults: contacts=email, leads=email, deals=name_plus_company, organizations=domain.

status.description: Lifecycle state. `preview` = parsed + validated but not committed; `queued` = waiting on worker; `running` = handler executing; `completed` = all rows succeeded; `completed_with_failures` = batch finalized but rows_failed > 0; `failed` = batch-level fault.

failure_summary.description: { reason: count } rollup of import_batch_rows failure_reason values.

size_bytes.description: Original payload size — used for the upload cap audit + telemetry.

error.description: Batch-level failure reason. Populated only when status=failed.
